abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Inescapable Accuracy
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Shimmershield
abilities.desc: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Shimmershield
abilities.desc: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Bladestorm
abilities.desc: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [Sustained Hits 1] ability while targeting an enemy unit within half range.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Assured Destruction
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a ^^Monster^^ or ^^Vehicle^^ unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

abilities.name: Fleet of Foot
abilities.desc: This unit can perform the Fade Back Agile Manoeuvre without spending a Battle Focus token to do so. It can do so even if other units have done so in the same phase, and doing so does not prevent other units from performing the same Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase.

abilities.name: Crewed Platform
abilities.desc: When the last Guardian Defender model in this unit is destroyed, any remaining Heavy Weapon Platform models in this unit are also destroyed.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable Save. This invulnerable save is improved to 4+ against melee attacks.

abilities.name: Acrobatic
abilities.desc: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks only.

abilities.name: Path of the Outcast
abilities.desc: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

abilities.name: Shimmershield
abilities.desc: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable Save.

abilities.name: Extreme Mobility
abilities.desc: Each time this unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, ignore any vertical distance when determining the total distance models in this unit can be moved during that move.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks only.

abilities.name: Target Acquisition
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with a long rifle. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Acrobatic Grace
abilities.desc: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Serpent Shield
abilities.desc: Models in the bearer’s unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Stormblades
abilities.desc: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

abilities.name: Crewed Platform
abilities.desc: When the last Storm Guardian model in this unit is destroyed, any remaining Serpent’s Scale Platform models in this unit are also destroyed.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Mandiblasters
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if it made a Charge move this turn, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Grenade Pack Flyover
abilities.desc: Once per turn, in your Movement phase, when this unit is set-up on the battlefield or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can use this ability. If it does, select one enemy unit within 8" of and visible to this unit and roll one D6 for each ^^Swooping Hawks^^ model in this unit. For each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds). Each time this unit uses this ability , until the end of the turn, you cannot target this unit with the Grenades Stratagem.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Protect (Psychic)
abilities.desc: While a ^^Farseer^^ model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Psychic Communion (Psychic)
abilities.desc: Each time this unit is selected to shoot, for each ^^Warlock^^ model in this unit, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of that model's Destructor weapon for each other friendly ^^Aeldari Psyker^^ model within 6" of this model (to a maximum of +2).

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, if this unit is not an Attached unit, this unit can join one ^^Guardian Defenders^^ or ^^Storm Guardians^^ unit from your army (a unit cannot have more than one ^^Warlock Conclave^^ unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

abilities.name: Flickerjump
abilities.desc: In your Movement phase, each time this unit is selected to make a Normal move, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge and models in it have a Move characteristic of 24". Each time this unit uses this ability, at the end of the phase, roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 1, this unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: War Construct
abilities.desc: This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Psychic Guidance
abilities.desc: While this unit is within 12" of one or more friendly Aeldari Psyker models, models in this unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+ and each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Forceshield
abilities.desc: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Malevolent Souls
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 3+, do not remove it from play; that destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Psychic Guidance
abilities.desc: While this unit is within 12" of one or more friendly Aeldari Psyker models, models in this unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+ and each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Beastmaster
abilities.desc: While this unit contains a Beastmaster model, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Goaded Savagery (Pain)
abilities.desc: In the Fight phase, when you select this unit to fight, you can spend 1 of your Pain tokens to Empower this unit. While this unit is Empowered, if it contains a ^^**Beastmaster**^^ model, each time a ^^**Beast**^^ model in this unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Court of the Archon
abilities.desc: While a ^^**Character**^^ model is leading a unit that contains one or more Lhamaean, Medusae, Sslyth and/or Ur-ghul models, that ^^**Character**^^ model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Deadly Retinue (Pain)
abilities.desc:
At the start of your Shooting phase or at the start of the Fight phase, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While this unit is Empowered:
■ If it contains one or more Lhamaean models, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the ^^**[LETHAL HITS]**^^ ability.
■ If it contains one or more Medusae models, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the ^^**[IGNORES COVER]**^^ ability.
■ If it contains one or more Sslyth models, each time a melee attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
■ If this unit contains one or more Ur-ghul models, this unit has the Fights First ability.

abilities.name: Court of the Archon [Legends]
abilities.desc: This unit can be led by an ^^**Archon**^^. Alternatively, in the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one ^^**Kabalite Warriors**^^ or ^^**Hand of the Archon**^^ unit from your army that is being led by an ^^**Archon**^^ (a unit cannot have more than one ^^**Court of the Archon**^^ unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as part of that ^^**Kabalite Warriors**^^ or ^^**Hand of the Archon **^^unit, and its Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

abilities.name: Pain Engine (Aura)
abilities.desc:
Each time you spend 1 Pain token to Empower a friendly unit within 9" of this unit, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if one or more models in this unit are not equipped with a spirit vortex: on a 5+, you gain 1 Pain token.


**Designer's Note:** Pain tokens you spend for reasons other than Empowering a unit do not trigger this ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Pain Parasite (Pain)
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when you select this unit to shoot or fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time this unit shoots or fights, after it has resolved its attacks, if one or more enemy models were destroyed as a result of those attacks, one model in this unit regains up to 3 lost wounds (if all models in this unit have their starting number of wounds and this unit is below its Starting Strength, 1 model is returned to this unit with 3 wounds remaining).

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Monstrous Hulks
abilities.desc: This unit cannot embark within a ^^**Venom**^^, but it can embark within other ^^**Drukhari Transports**^^; when doing so, each ^^**Grotesque**^^ model takes up the space of 3 models.

abilities.name: Macro-steroids (Pain)
abilities.desc: In the Fight phase, when you select this unit to fight, you can spend 1 of your Pain tokens to Empower this unit. While Empowered, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have a Strength characteristic of 8 and the ^^**[LETHAL HITS]**^^ ability.

abilities.name: Phantasm Grenade Launcher
abilities.desc: The bearer’s unit has the Grenades keyword.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Battlefield Butchery (Pain)
abilities.desc: In the Fight phase, when you select this unit to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of this unit's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Skyboard Evasion
abilities.desc: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Tormentors
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test. Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets a Battle-shocked unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Decapitating Strikes (Pain)
abilities.desc: In the Fight phase, when you select this unit to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets an ^^**Infantry**^^ unit, that attack has the ^^**[Devastating Wounds]**^^ ability.

abilities.name: Incubi Shrine Token
abilities.desc:
Once per battle for each Incubi Shrine token this unit has, you can change the result of one Hit roll or one Wound roll made for a model in this unit to an unmodified 6.


For every 5 models in this unit, it can have 1 Incubi Shrine token.

abilities.name: Phantasm Grenade Launcher
abilities.desc: The bearer’s unit has the ^^**Smoke**^^ and ^^**Grenades**^^ keywords.

abilities.name: Kabalite Icon
abilities.desc: While the bearer's unit is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to the bearer's Objective Control characteristic.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Cruel Enforcers
abilities.desc: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under you control, until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

abilities.name: Sadistic Raiders (Pain)
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when you select this unit to shoot or fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Fade Away (Pain)
abilities.desc: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. Each time you do, remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Shade Weavers
abilities.desc: This unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 6+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Eviscerating Fly-by
abilities.desc: Each time this unit ends a Normal or Advance move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monster **^^and ^^**Vehicle**^^ units) that it moved over during that move, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Matchless Swiftness (Pain)
abilities.desc: In your Movement phase, when you select this unit to Advance, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 8" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Airborne Evasion
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Winged Strike (Pain)
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, when you select this unit to shoot, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time a model in this unit makes a range attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Torture Device
abilities.desc: Each time this unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain 1 additional Pain token.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Devoted to Pain
abilities.desc: If a model in this unit is equipped with 2 macro-scalpels, those weapons have the ^^**[Twin-Linked]**^^ ability.

abilities.name: Mindless Killing Machines (Pain)
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 2+, do not remove it from play; that destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and it is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Torturer’s Craft
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase and the Fight phase, after this unit has shot or fought, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Vehicles**^^) hit by one or more of those attacks. That units must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Experimental Enhancements (Pain)
abilities.desc:
In the Fight phase, when you select this unit to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. Each time you do, select one of the following to apply to this unit until the end of the phase:

■ Melee weapons equipped by non-^^**Character**^^ models in this unit have an Attacks characteristic of 3.
■ Melee weapons equipped by non-^^**Character**^^ models in this unit have an Attacks characteristic of 4 and the ^^**[Hazardous]**^^ ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc:
This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save.
This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save against melee attacks.

abilities.name: No Escape
abilities.desc: Each time an enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters**^^ and ^^**Vehicles**^^) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

abilities.name: Acrobatic Gladiators (Pain)
abilities.desc: At the start of your Charge phase, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, this unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Shade of Twilight
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Reckless Abandon
abilities.desc: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

abilities.name: Psychic Communion (Psychic)
abilities.desc: Each time this unit is selected to shoot, for each ^^Warlock^^ model in this unit, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of that model's Destructor weapon for each other friendly ^^Aeldari Psyker^^ model within 6" of this model (to a maximum of +2).

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, if this unit is not an Attached unit, this unit can join one ^^Windriders^^ unit from your army (a unit cannot have more than one ^^Warlock Skyrunners^^ unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

abilities.name: Runes of Battle (Psychic)
abilities.desc: Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [Ignores Cover] ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (Warlock)
abilities.desc: A Warlock Skyrunner has a 4+ Invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Crystalline Targeting
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly ^^Aeldari^^ unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. Each unit can only be selected for that ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Harassment Fire
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save against ranged attacks, and 4+ Invulnerable save against melee attacks.

abilities.name: No Escape
abilities.desc: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability is selected to Fall Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Tormentors
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 6+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Eviscerating Fly-by
abilities.desc: Each time this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) that it moved over during that move. If you do, roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Murderous Crossfire
abilities.desc: After this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly ^^**Drukhari**^^ unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Swooping Descent (Pain)
abilities.desc: In your Movement phase, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time a model in this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units. When doing so, if this unit is set up within 9" of one or more enemy units, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.
